text:
Care 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0–12 (Number of months) 

COMMENT: This variable is the number of months during the year when the monthly TAF managed care plan type 
code in any of the 16 possible monthly plan type fields = 20 (Other). There are 192 possible plan type 
variables in a calendar year: 12 months with 16 managed care plan type variables per month = 192 
variables; MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_01_01–MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_16_12. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
